package rulecoverage

func NegativeSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnly() string {
    ruleID := "sort_before_first_or_membership_only"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Sorting a collection when only the first element or min/max is needed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
